tagline: Streamwood's Go-To Crew for Landscaping & Hardscaping
hero_subtitle: Professional landscaping, hardscaping, and outdoor construction for homes and businesses across Streamwood and the northwest Chicago suburbs. Quality craftsmanship you can see.
service_area_description: Serving Streamwood, Hanover Park, Bartlett, Schaumburg, Elgin, and the surrounding northwest suburban communities.
seo_title: Noah's Landscape & Construction | Landscaping in Streamwood, IL
seo_description: Noah's Landscape & Construction in Streamwood, IL. Professional landscaping, hardscaping, patios, retaining walls, and lawn care. Call 847-361-5006 for a free estimate.
services_subtitle: From lawn care to custom patios and retaining walls, we handle every aspect of your outdoor space with precision and pride.
reviews_subtitle: Streamwood homeowners trust Noah's for honest pricing, clean work, and results that last.
cta_heading: Ready to transform your outdoor space?
cta_subtitle: Get a free estimate today. We'll walk your property and give you an honest plan — no pressure, no surprises.
footer_description: Professional landscaping and hardscaping contractor serving Streamwood and the northwest Chicago suburbs. Patios, retaining walls, lawn care, and complete outdoor transformations.

services_featured.name: Landscape Design & Installation
services_featured.description: Custom landscape plans brought to life with expert planting, grading, and design. We transform ordinary yards into outdoor spaces you'll love coming home to.

services_secondary.name: Patios & Hardscaping
services_secondary.description: Brick and stone patios, walkways, fire pits, and outdoor living areas built to last. We handle design and construction from start to finish.

services_accent.name: Retaining Walls & Grading
services_accent.description: Structural and decorative retaining walls that solve drainage problems and add curb appeal. Engineered for Illinois soil and weather conditions.

services_wide.name: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services_wide.description: Weekly mowing, seasonal cleanups, fertilization, and aeration programs that keep your lawn thick, green, and healthy all season long.

about_features.title: Built by Craftsmen
about_features.description: Our crew specializes in hardscaping and outdoor construction — we don't just mow lawns, we build outdoor spaces that add real value to your home.

about_features.title: Honest Estimates, No Surprises
about_features.description: We walk your property, explain the scope, and give you a fair price upfront. The price we quote is the price you pay.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Fully licensed and insured for landscaping and construction work across Illinois. Your property is protected from start to finish.

reviews.name: Mike T.
reviews.text: Noah's crew built a beautiful paver patio and fire pit in our backyard. The work was clean, on time, and the price was exactly what they quoted. We love it.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: They installed a retaining wall and completely regraded our side yard that was flooding. Problem solved and it looks great. Very professional team.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: We've used Noah's for lawn care and landscaping for three seasons now. Always reliable, always looks great. Best landscaper we've had.
